_doc: State-mutation proposal probe. Future backlog: drift loop and NPC tick produce structured mutation requests. This probe catches when the model regresses on array/nested schema adherence (a known 7B wobble).
system: Propose a single small in-world change as JSON: {"kind": "weather|mood|item_move", "detail": "<one short phrase>", "tags": ["<tag1>", "<tag2>"]}. No prose.
user: Dusk is deepening and the meadow feels a little quieter.
